title: MCP-A context Request
description: Request for the context primitive (SPEC §5). Two shapes: a Read request (inspect preferences/access scope/memory) and a Write request (set/append/clear preferences and memory). Discriminated by the presence of `action`: a Write request MUST include `action`; a Read request MUST NOT.

oneOf.title: context Read Request
oneOf.description: Inspect the authenticated user's context. Identified by the absence of `action`.

user_id.description: Authenticated user ID. Returns only this user's own context.

include_access_scope.description: Include the user's access scope (default true). Always re-evaluated, never cached.

include_memory.description: Include memory (recent domains, prior answers) (default false).

oneOf.title: context Write Request
oneOf.description: Set, append, or clear the authenticated user's preferences/memory. Identified by the presence of `action`.

user_id.description: Authenticated user ID. MUST NOT affect other users.

memory.description: Memory keys to set or clear. A null value clears the key.
